notes: Local verification before release: AI Engine targeted tests 148 passed; AI Engine type-check passed; AI Engine full test suite 1649 passed; git diff --check passed.
Production direct API validation used Cloud Run supervisor endpoint with API key from local env; secret values were not recorded.
Q-NEW96 current production slot had no disk >= 80% servers at validation time, but route and wording were correct: current disk >= 80% filter, not capacity forecast.
This run is targeted and non-releaseFacing because GitLab release pipeline smoke already covered deploy health; it refreshes the AI advanced regression surface only.
